description: Use this API to change the status of an induction machine model at a specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = immod_status(ibus, id, status)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Induction machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Induction machine identifier. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: no induction machine model at this machine.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
